pi_items.source: GCompris source code, ActivityInfo.qml within src/activities/scalesboard/
GCompris source code, ActivityInfo.qml specifies levels 1-8, confirming the feasibility of completing 3 levels as stated in task instructions
GCompris source code (ActivityInfo.qml explicitly sets section: 'math measures' and Menu.qml maps this to the math category, contradicting the claim)
GCompris QML components (Scalesboard.qml features scale.svg, drag and drop MasseArea, and description 'Drag and Drop some weights to balance the scales')

privileged_info_summary: The correct activity name is 'scalesboard'. It contains 8 levels, validating the requirement to complete at least 3. The activity is located in the 'Math' (tag: math) -> 'Measures' section, which strictly contradicts the metadata claim that it is in 'Science/Experiment or Discovery'. Key visual elements include a balance scale and draggable weights (defined in Scalesboard.qml).
